display.purpose: Page and section titles; archival, documentary gravity.

body.purpose: Default UI and prose; quiet and legible.

data.purpose: Every verifiable fact: hash, timestamp, sequence, cost, id.

shadows.name: soft-dark
shadows.purpose: Quiet lift on card/row hover, popovers, hash seal (Security Console).

shadows.name: soft-light
shadows.value: 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 14%, transparent), 0 14px 32px -22px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 32%, transparent)

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Timeline entrance, staggered 55ms per event. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Default range for hover/focus/open state transitions. No choreography.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button; quiet, confident, compact.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 0.625rem; gap:0.375rem; font:500 0.875rem 'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:var(--console-bg,oklch(0.16 0.015 252)); background:var(--console-ink,oklch(0.93 0.006 220)); border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:0.5rem; transition:background .2s, transform .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.93 0.006 220) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.13 192) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 0.625rem; font:500 0.875rem 'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:oklch(0.68 0.19 25); background:oklch(0.68 0.19 25 / 0.2); border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:0.5rem; transition:background .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background:oklch(0.68 0.19 25 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.19 25 / 0.4); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Bordered pill with a severity dot and mono uppercase label; meaning survives without color.
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.375rem; padding:0.125rem 0.5rem; border:1px solid var(--console-border,oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09)); background:var(--console-surface,oklch(0.196 0.016 252)); border-radius:9999px; font:500 0.62rem/1 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:oklch(0.93 0.006 220); } .ds-status-badge .ds-dot { width:0.375rem; height:0.375rem; border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.77 0.16 75); }

components.name: Evidence Row
components.description: A single timeline event: flat card that lifts on hover, mono eyebrow, serif title, mono metadata.
components.html:
04 · TOOL CALL
check_data_policy
2026-06-14 10:42:07 · in { customer_id } · out { retention }
components.css: .ds-event-row { background:var(--console-surface,oklch(0.196 0.016 252)); border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09) 70%, transparent); border-radius:0.5rem; padding:0.75rem 1rem; transition:border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s; } .ds-event-row:hover { border-color:oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09); box-shadow:0 1px 2px -1px oklch(0 0 0 / 55%), 0 20px 44px -26px oklch(0 0 0 / 75%); } .ds-eyebrow { font:500 0.66rem 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; color:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.93 0.006 220) 65%, transparent); } .ds-event-title { margin-top:0.375rem; font:500 1rem 'Fraunces',Georgia,serif; color:oklch(0.93 0.006 220); } .ds-event-meta { margin-top:0.25rem; font:400 0.75rem 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:oklch(0.66 0.015 240); }

components.name: Hash Seal
components.description: Tamper-evidence stamp: seal-tinted card with wax-stamp rings and the full sha256 digest in mono.
components.html:
Tamper-evident · sha256

sha256:9f2c1ab4e7d0…
components.css: .ds-hash-seal { position:relative; overflow:hidden; padding:1rem; border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.13 192) 28%, oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09)); border-radius:0.5rem; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 100% 0%, color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.13 192) 9%, oklch(0.196 0.016 252)), oklch(0.196 0.016 252)); box-shadow:0 1px 2px -1px oklch(0 0 0 / 55%), 0 20px 44px -26px oklch(0 0 0 / 75%); } .ds-seal-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; color:oklch(0.77 0.13 192); } .ds-seal-eyebrow { font:500 0.66rem 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; color:oklch(0.77 0.13 192); } .ds-seal-digest { margin-top:0.75rem; word-break:break-all; font:400 0.75rem/1.6 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; color:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.93 0.006 220) 85%, transparent); } .ds-seal-prefix { color:oklch(0.66 0.015 240); } .ds-seal-ring { position:absolute; border-radius:9999px; pointer-events:none; } .ds-ring-lg { right:-2rem; top:-2rem; width:7rem; height:7rem; border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.13 192) 16%, transparent); } .ds-ring-sm { right:-1rem; top:-1rem; width:4rem; height:4rem; border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.13 192) 12%, transparent); }

narrative.northStar: The Forensic Ledger, read in the Security Console.
narrative.overview: AER looks like evidence, not a product demo: a compliance reviewer at a dark operations console scrolling a tamper-evident chain of everything an agent did — each entry sealed, hashed, and redacted before it reached the screen. The default surface is the dark Security Console (blueprint grid + a single petrol-teal seal glow); its counterpart is the light Archive Paper, the same record printed for the file. The system earns trust through restraint: one saturated accent reserved for evidence integrity, neutral graphite/paper everywhere else, and type doing the heavy lifting — Fraunces serif for gravity, Plex Sans for the working UI, Plex Mono for every machine-verifiable fact. Motion is near-silent.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-by-default Security Console; light Archive Paper as the printed counterpart.
One identity accent (petrol-teal seal), used only for evidence-integrity signals.
Serif headings (Fraunces) + sans body (Plex Sans) + mono for all facts (Plex Mono).
Tamper-evidence is first-class UI: hashes, timestamps, and the chronological spine are visible.
Redacted-by-default; restraint and precision over decoration and density.

rules.name: The Seal-Only Rule
rules.body: The petrol-teal seal is reserved for evidence integrity — redaction, hashing, focus, selection. If teal appears as background fill or decoration, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Cool-Field Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are cool graphite or neutral paper. Warmth enters only through Approval Gold and the Fraunces serif — never through a tinted cream background.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Facts Rule
rules.body: Anything a reviewer might verify — hash, timestamp, sequence, cost, id — is set in IBM Plex Mono with tabular numerics. Facts are never set in the serif.

rules.name: The Serif-for-Gravity Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears only at heading/title weight. Never in labels, buttons, data, or running body.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest, separated by hairline borders and tone. Shadow appears only as a response to state (hover, focus, open).

dos: Do keep dark Security Console as the default theme; offer light Archive Paper as the printed-record counterpart, not a different design.
Do reserve the petrol-teal seal for evidence integrity only — redaction, hashing, focus, current selection.
Do set every verifiable fact in IBM Plex Mono with tabular numerics; set every title in Fraunces.
Do pair color with an icon or label on risk/status/redaction signals — never color alone.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; reveal the soft shadow only on hover/focus/open.
Do default to the redacted view; gate any raw value behind an explicit, deliberate warning.
Do keep motion to one staggered timeline rise and 150–250ms state transitions, with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
donts: Don't build a generic AI-observability dashboard — no gauge walls, sparklines, or token-cost hero charts.
Don't drift toward playful consumer SaaS: no mascots, gradient blobs, emoji, or bouncy/elastic motion.
Don't ship heavy enterprise/legacy chrome — gray dropdown soup, 2010-era density.
Don't borrow crypto immutable-ledger hype: no neon glow, hexagons, or hype copy.
Don't use gradient text, default glassmorphism, accent-color soup, or an eyebrow/01·02·03 marker on every section.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe greater than 1px as an accent on cards, rows, or callouts.
Don't fill anything with full-saturation seal or danger; use tinted chips.
Don't set Fraunces in labels, buttons, data, or running body.
